buildings.name: Keller Hall
buildings.description: A major academic building commonly associated with computer science and engineering classes.

info_points.title: Keller Hall
info_points.description: You are in the main Keller Hall corridor near several classrooms.

info_points.title: Classroom Entrance
info_points.description: You are near classroom 3-180 in Keller Hall.

rooms.description: A classroom that can be used for lectures and student presentations.
notes: This room is used in the demo as the target classroom.

rooms.description: Main entrance and open gathering area for visitors and students.

buildings.name: Lind Hall
buildings.description: Home to the School of Mathematics and the Institute for Mathematics and its Applications. Houses classrooms, faculty offices, and study spaces for math and related disciplines.

info_points.title: Lind Hall
info_points.description: You are at Lind Hall, home of the School of Mathematics.

info_points.title: Lind Hall Corridor
info_points.description: You are in the main corridor of Lind Hall near classrooms and offices.

rooms.description: A medium-sized classroom used for math and statistics lectures.
A smaller classroom used for upper-division math courses and seminars.
A seminar room used for graduate-level discussions and presentations.
Main entrance area with building directory and bulletin boards.

buildings.name: Moos Tower
buildings.description: A large campus building that students often find confusing during their first visits.

info_points.title: Moos Tower Lobby
info_points.description: You are near the main Moos Tower lobby information area.

public_events.title: Computer Science Guest Talk
public_events.summary: A guest speaker event for students interested in AI and systems.

public_events.title: Mathematics Colloquium: Applied Topology
public_events.summary: Weekly math colloquium talk on applied topology in data science. Open to all students.

public_events.title: IMA Industrial Problems Seminar
public_events.summary: Institute for Mathematics and its Applications seminar on optimization in industry.

public_events.title: Student Success Workshop
public_events.summary: A workshop about campus resources and academic planning.
